PAIN_POINT_1_EN: Charging port moisture glitch

PAIN_POINT_1_QUOTE_EN: Moisture in charging port, known glitch

PAIN_POINT_2_EN: Video stalling and weak connection

PAIN_POINT_2_QUOTE_EN: It stalls out, pausing videos
